enfyra_column.name: enfyra_column
enfyra_column.description: Stores column/field definitions for all tables in the system

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Column name in the database

columns.name: type
columns.description: Data type of the column

columns.name: isGenerated
columns.description: Whether the value is auto-generated by the system

columns.name: isPrimary
columns.description: Whether this column is a primary key

columns.name: isNullable
columns.description: Whether NULL values are allowed

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined column

columns.name: defaultValue
columns.description: Default value for the column when inserting new records

columns.name: options
columns.description: Additional options like enum values, array items, or validation rules

columns.name: isUpdatable
columns.description: Whether the column can be updated after creation

columns.name: isPublished
columns.description: Whether this column is publicly readable (public routes/anonymous included)

columns.name: isEncrypted
columns.description: Whether this column is encrypted at rest by the Enfyra engine

columns.name: description
columns.description: Rich text description of the column's purpose

columns.name: placeholder
columns.description: Placeholder text for form inputs

columns.name: metadata
columns.description: Additional metadata for the column

relations.description: The table that this column belongs to

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: ruleType
columns.description: Type of validation rule

columns.name: value
columns.description: Rule payload — shape depends on ruleType (e.g. {v: 10} for min/max, {v: 'email'} for format)

columns.name: message
columns.description: Custom error message when rule fails (falls back to default if null)

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether this rule is active

columns.name: description
columns.description: Admin note about this rule

relations.description: The column this rule applies to

enfyra_relation.name: enfyra_relation
enfyra_relation.description: Defines relationships between tables (one-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-one, many-to-many)

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: type
columns.description: Type of relationship between tables

columns.name: propertyName
columns.description: Property name for accessing the relation in queries

columns.name: isNullable
columns.description: Whether the relation can be null

columns.name: onDelete
columns.description: Action to perform when referenced record is deleted

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined relation

columns.name: isPublished
columns.description: Whether this relation is publicly readable (public routes/anonymous included)

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of the relationship purpose

columns.name: foreignKeyColumn
columns.description: Physical foreign key column used by SQL owning relations

columns.name: referencedColumn
columns.description: Physical target column referenced by SQL foreign keys

columns.name: constraintName
columns.description: Physical foreign key constraint name when known

columns.name: junctionTableName
columns.description: Name of the junction table for many-to-many relations

columns.name: junctionSourceColumn
columns.description: Column name in junction table referencing source table

columns.name: junctionTargetColumn
columns.description: Column name in junction table referencing target table

columns.name: metadata
columns.description: Additional metadata for the relation

columns.name: isUpdatable
columns.description: Whether this relation can be updated. When false, the foreign key column will be protected from updates.

relations.description: The table where this relation is defined
The table that this relation points to
Owning-side relation that this inverse maps to (self-referencing FK)

enfyra_table.name: enfyra_table
enfyra_table.description: Stores metadata for all tables/collections in the database

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Table name in the database

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system table

columns.name: isSingleRecord
columns.description: Whether this table should only have a single record (e.g., enfyra_setting)

columns.name: uniques
columns.description: Array of unique constraints (e.g., [['email'], ['name', 'parent']])

columns.name: indexes
columns.description: Array of database indexes for performance optimization

columns.name: alias
columns.description: Human-readable alias for the table

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of the table's purpose

columns.name: metadata
columns.description: Additional metadata for the table

columns.name: validateBody
columns.description: Auto-validate POST/PATCH bodies against column + relation metadata and column rules. Default true (opt-out per table); set false to skip middleware validation for a table

enfyra_user.name: enfyra_user
enfyra_user.description: Stores user accounts and authentication information

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique user identifier (UUID)

columns.name: email
columns.description: User's email address (unique login identifier)

columns.name: password
columns.description: Hashed password for authentication (nullable for OAuth users)

columns.name: isRootAdmin
columns.description: Whether user has root admin privileges (cannot be changed)

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-generated user account

relations.description: User's assigned role for permissions

enfyra_oauth_config.name: enfyra_oauth_config
enfyra_oauth_config.description: Configures OAuth providers for authentication (Google, Facebook, GitHub, etc.)

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: provider
columns.description: OAuth provider name

columns.name: clientId
columns.description: OAuth client ID from the provider

columns.name: clientSecret
columns.description: OAuth client secret from the provider

columns.name: redirectUri
columns.description: OAuth provider callback URL registered with the provider (e.g., https://api.enfyra.com/auth/google/callback)

columns.name: appCallbackUrl
columns.description: Client callback URL used when auto cookie handling is disabled. The backend redirects here with token query parameters.

columns.name: autoSetCookies
columns.description: When enabled, the backend redirects back to the Enfyra Nuxt app /api/auth/set-cookies endpoint and lets Nitro set auth cookies before redirecting to the requested page.

columns.name: sourceCode
columns.description: Optional script that returns an object merged into newly created OAuth users. Existing identity fields take precedence.

columns.name: scriptLanguage
columns.description: Language used by sourceCode before server compilation

columns.name: compiledCode
columns.description: Server-compiled JavaScript code executed by the OAuth user provisioning runtime

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether this OAuth provider is active

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of this OAuth configuration

enfyra_oauth_account.name: enfyra_oauth_account
enfyra_oauth_account.description: Links user accounts to OAuth providers for authentication

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: provider
columns.description: OAuth provider name

columns.name: providerUserId
columns.description: Unique user ID from the OAuth provider

relations.description: The user account linked to this OAuth provider

enfyra_setting.name: enfyra_setting
enfyra_setting.description: Stores global system configuration and settings

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: isInit
columns.description: Whether the system has been initialized

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether these are system settings

columns.name: projectName
columns.description: Name of the project/application

columns.name: projectDescription
columns.description: Description of the project/application

columns.name: projectFavicon
columns.description: Favicon URL or path for the project/application

columns.name: maxQueryDepth
columns.description: Maximum nesting depth for REST deep-fetch and GraphQL queries (default: 7)

columns.name: maxUploadFileSize
columns.description: Maximum upload file size in MB (default: 10)

columns.name: maxRequestBodySize
columns.description: Maximum JSON/urlencoded request body size in MB (default: 1)

columns.name: uniquesIndexesRepaired
columns.description: Whether user-table uniques/indexes metadata has been repaired (one-time fix for fkColumn leak)

enfyra_cors_origin.name: enfyra_cors_origin
enfyra_cors_origin.description: Allowed CORS origins served by the public /enfyra_cors_origin endpoint

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: value
columns.description: Allowed origin URL (e.g., https://app.example.com)

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether this origin is currently active

columns.name: description
columns.description: Optional note for this origin entry

enfyra_route.name: enfyra_route
enfyra_route.description: Defines API routes/endpoints for the application

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: path
columns.description: URL path for the route (e.g., /api/users)

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the route is active and accessible

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined route

columns.name: icon
columns.description: Icon identifier for UI display

columns.name: maxUploadFileSize
columns.description: Optional route-specific maximum upload file size in MB. Overrides enfyra_setting.maxUploadFileSize for multipart requests when set.

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what the route does

relations.description: Primary table that this route operates on
HTTP methods this route supports
Pre-hooks that run before route execution
Post-hooks that run after route execution

enfyra_role.name: enfyra_role
enfyra_role.description: Defines user roles for permission management

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Unique role name (e.g., Admin, Editor, Viewer)

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of the role's purpose and permissions

enfyra_route_permission.name: enfyra_route_permission
enfyra_route_permission.description: Maps permissions between roles, users, and routes

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether this permission rule is active

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what this permission allows

relations.description: Role that this permission applies to
Route that this permission controls access to
Specific users who have this permission

enfyra_field_permission.name: enfyra_field_permission
enfyra_field_permission.description: Defines per-field permissions (columns and relations) by role and user, with optional conditions

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether this rule is active

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined field permission

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what this rule does

columns.name: action
columns.description: Action this rule applies to

columns.name: effect
columns.description: Whether this rule allows or denies access

columns.name: condition
columns.description: Optional filter DSL condition that must match for this rule to apply

relations.description: Role that this rule applies to
Column this rule applies to
Relation this rule applies to
Specific users this rule applies to

enfyra_route_handler.name: enfyra_route_handler
enfyra_route_handler.description: Stores custom logic handlers for route endpoints

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: sourceCode
columns.description: Custom JavaScript or TypeScript code to execute for this route

columns.name: scriptLanguage
columns.description: Language used by sourceCode before server compilation

columns.name: compiledCode
columns.description: Server-compiled JavaScript code executed by the runtime

columns.name: timeout
columns.description: Timeout in milliseconds for this handler execution

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what this handler does

relations.description: The route this handler is attached to
HTTP method (GET, POST, etc.) this handler responds to

enfyra_pre_hook.name: enfyra_pre_hook
enfyra_pre_hook.description: Defines lifecycle hooks that run before route execution

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Descriptive name for the hook

columns.name: sourceCode
columns.description: Code to execute before the main route handler

columns.name: scriptLanguage
columns.description: Language used by sourceCode before server compilation

columns.name: compiledCode
columns.description: Server-compiled JavaScript code executed by the runtime

columns.name: priority
columns.description: Execution order (lower numbers execute first)

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the hook is active

columns.name: isGlobal
columns.description: Whether this hook applies globally to all routes

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what the hook does

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined hook

relations.description: Route this hook is attached to (null when isGlobal is true)
HTTP methods this hook applies to

enfyra_post_hook.name: enfyra_post_hook
enfyra_post_hook.description: Defines lifecycle hooks that run after route execution

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Descriptive name for the hook

columns.name: sourceCode
columns.description: Code to execute after the main route handler

columns.name: scriptLanguage
columns.description: Language used by sourceCode before server compilation

columns.name: compiledCode
columns.description: Server-compiled JavaScript code executed by the runtime

columns.name: priority
columns.description: Execution order (lower numbers execute first)

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the hook is active

columns.name: isGlobal
columns.description: Whether this hook applies globally to all routes

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what the hook does

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined hook

relations.description: Route this hook is attached to (null when isGlobal is true)
HTTP methods this hook applies to

enfyra_session.name: enfyra_session
enfyra_session.description: Stores active user sessions and authentication tokens

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique session identifier

columns.name: expiredAt
columns.description: When the session expires

columns.name: remember
columns.description: Whether this is a long-lived 'remember me' session

columns.name: loginProvider
columns.description: OAuth provider used to login (google, facebook, github) or null for email/password

columns.name: refreshTokenHash
columns.description: SHA-256 hash of the current valid refresh token

relations.description: User who owns this session

enfyra_api_token.name: enfyra_api_token
enfyra_api_token.description: Stores user-owned API tokens for programmatic access

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique API token identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: User-facing API token name

columns.name: tokenHash
columns.description: SHA-256 hash of the API token

columns.name: prefix
columns.description: Safe token prefix for display

columns.name: last4
columns.description: Safe final token characters for display

columns.name: expiresAt
columns.description: When the API token expires; null means never expires

columns.name: lastUsedAt
columns.description: When the API token was last exchanged for an access token

columns.name: lastUsedIp
columns.description: Last client IP seen for this API token

relations.description: User who owns this API token

enfyra_schema_migration.name: enfyra_schema_migration
enfyra_schema_migration.description: Tracks schema migration operations with up/down scripts for automatic recovery

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key

columns.name: uuid
columns.description: Unique migration version identifier

columns.name: tableName
columns.description: Affected table name

columns.name: operation
columns.description: Operation type: create, update, or delete

columns.name: status
columns.description: Status: pending, running, completed, failed, rolled_back

columns.name: upScript
columns.description: DDL statements to apply the migration

columns.name: downScript
columns.description: DDL statements to revert the migration

columns.name: beforeSnapshot
columns.description: Table metadata before migration

columns.name: errorMessage
columns.description: Error details if migration failed

columns.name: startedAt
columns.description: When migration started executing

columns.name: completedAt
columns.description: When migration completed or was rolled back

enfyra_method.name: enfyra_method
enfyra_method.description: Defines available HTTP methods (GET, POST, etc.) and GraphQL operations

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: HTTP method name (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE, PUT, HEAD, OPTIONS)

columns.name: buttonColor
columns.description: Hex background color used when rendering this method in admin UI controls

columns.name: textColor
columns.description: Hex text color used when rendering this method in admin UI controls

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined method

relations.description: Permissions associated with this method
Routes that allow this method without authentication
Routes that have this method available
Routes where this method skips RoleGuard (still requires authentication)

enfyra_menu.name: enfyra_menu
enfyra_menu.description: Defines the navigation menu structure for the application

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: type
columns.description: Type of menu item (Dropdown Menu can have children, Menu is a leaf node)

columns.name: label
columns.description: Display text for the menu item

columns.name: icon
columns.description: Icon identifier for the menu item

columns.name: path
columns.description: URL path the menu item links to

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the menu item is visible

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined menu item

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of the menu item's purpose

columns.name: order
columns.description: Display order within parent (lower numbers appear first)

columns.name: permission
columns.description: Permission rules controlling who can see this menu item

relations.description: Parent menu item (null for top-level items)

enfyra_extension.name: enfyra_extension
enfyra_extension.description: Stores custom UI extensions (pages, widgets, and global shell extensions) written in Vue

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: type
columns.description: Type of extension (full page, embeddable widget, or global shell extension)

columns.name: name
columns.description: Human-readable name for the extension

columns.name: extensionId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the extension (auto-generated)

columns.name: version
columns.description: Version number of the extension

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the extension is active

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined extension

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what the extension does

columns.name: compiledCode
columns.description: Compiled/bundled JavaScript code ready for execution

columns.name: code
columns.description: Source code for the extension (React/Vue component)

relations.description: Menu item that links to this extension
User who created this extension
User who last updated this extension

enfyra_folder.name: enfyra_folder
enfyra_folder.description: Organizes files into a hierarchical folder structure

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique folder identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Folder display name

columns.name: slug
columns.description: URL-friendly folder name (auto-generated from name)

columns.name: order
columns.description: Display order within parent folder

columns.name: icon
columns.description: Icon identifier for the folder

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of the folder's purpose

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined folder

relations.description: Parent folder (null for root folders)
User who owns this folder

enfyra_file.name: enfyra_file
enfyra_file.description: Stores uploaded files and their metadata

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique file identifier

columns.name: filename
columns.description: Original filename including extension

columns.name: isPublished
columns.description: Allow public access without authentication

columns.name: mimetype
columns.description: MIME type of the file (e.g., image/png, application/pdf)

columns.name: filesize
columns.description: File size in bytes

columns.name: location
columns.description: Full path or URL to the file

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description or notes about the file

columns.name: status
columns.description: File status (active, archived, or quarantined)

relations.description: Folder containing this file
User who uploaded the file
Storage configuration (account) used for this file

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: actions
columns.description: Allowed actions for this permission

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Enable/disable this permission rule

columns.name: allowedDomains
columns.description: List of allowed domains for CORS (null = all domains)

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what this permission allows

relations.description: File this permission applies to
Role that has this permission
Specific users who have this permission

enfyra_package.name: enfyra_package
enfyra_package.description: Manages npm packages installed in the application (app and server)

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: NPM package name (e.g., lodash, express)

columns.name: version
columns.description: Actual installed version from node_modules

columns.name: flags
columns.description: Install flags like '--ignore-engines --force'

columns.name: type
columns.description: Whether this is a frontend (App) or backend (Server) package

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the package is currently active

columns.name: description
columns.description: Short package description

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a core system package

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current lifecycle status of the package

columns.name: installTimeout
columns.description: Install timeout in seconds

columns.name: lastError
columns.description: Last error message from install/update/uninstall operation

relations.description: User who installed this package

enfyra_bootstrap_script.name: enfyra_bootstrap_script
enfyra_bootstrap_script.description: Stores custom scripts that run during application initialization

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Unique name identifier for the bootstrap script

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what the script does

columns.name: sourceCode
columns.description: Source code to execute

columns.name: scriptLanguage
columns.description: Language used by sourceCode before server compilation

columns.name: compiledCode
columns.description: Server-compiled JavaScript code executed by the runtime

columns.name: timeout
columns.description: Timeout in milliseconds for script execution. If not set, uses default system timeout.

columns.name: priority
columns.description: Execution priority order (lower numbers execute first)

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the script is enabled for execution

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-generated script

relations.description: User who created the script
User who last updated the script

enfyra_storage_config.name: enfyra_storage_config
enfyra_storage_config.description: Configures storage backends for file uploads (local, S3, GCS, etc.)

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Storage configuration name (e.g., 'AWS S3', 'Google Cloud Storage', 'Local Storage')

columns.name: type
columns.description: Storage backend type

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether this storage configuration is active

columns.name: bucket
columns.description: Bucket name (used for S3/GCS)

columns.name: region
columns.description: Storage region - Required for S3 (e.g., us-east-1, ap-southeast-1), optional for R2 (use 'auto' or leave empty), not needed for GCS/Local Storage

columns.name: accessKeyId
columns.description: S3/R2 access key ID

columns.name: secretAccessKey
columns.description: S3/R2 secret access key

columns.name: accountId
columns.description: Cloudflare account ID (for R2, used to generate endpoint automatically)

columns.name: credentials
columns.description: GCS service account JSON credentials

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of this storage configuration

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined storage configuration

relations.description: User who created this configuration
User who last updated this configuration

enfyra_websocket.name: enfyra_websocket
enfyra_websocket.description: Defines WebSocket gateway namespaces for real-time communication

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: path
columns.description: WebSocket namespace path with pattern support (e.g., /chat/: roomId)

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the gateway is active

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined gateway

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of the gateway's purpose

columns.name: requireAuth
columns.description: Whether authentication is required for connections

columns.name: sourceCode
columns.description: JavaScript or TypeScript source code to execute

columns.name: scriptLanguage
columns.description: Language used by sourceCode before server compilation

columns.name: compiledCode
columns.description: Server-compiled JavaScript code executed by the runtime

columns.name: connectionHandlerTimeout
columns.description: Timeout in milliseconds for connection handler execution. If not set, uses default system timeout.

enfyra_websocket_event.name: enfyra_websocket_event
enfyra_websocket_event.description: Defines event handlers for WebSocket gateways

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: eventName
columns.description: Event name to listen for (e.g., sendMessage, typing)

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the event handler is active

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined event

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what the event does

columns.name: sourceCode
columns.description: JavaScript or TypeScript source code to execute

columns.name: scriptLanguage
columns.description: Language used by sourceCode before server compilation

columns.name: compiledCode
columns.description: Server-compiled JavaScript code executed by the runtime

columns.name: timeout
columns.description: Timeout in milliseconds for event handler execution. If not set, uses default system timeout.

relations.description: Gateway this event belongs to

enfyra_flow.name: enfyra_flow
enfyra_flow.description: Defines automated workflows with triggers, steps, and execution logic

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Unique name of the flow

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what the flow does

columns.name: icon
columns.description: Icon identifier for UI display

columns.name: triggerType
columns.description: Type of trigger: schedule (cron) or manual (user-initiated via UI/API/handler)

columns.name: triggerConfig
columns.description: JSON config for the trigger (cron expression, event table/action, webhook path)

columns.name: timeout
columns.description: Maximum execution time in milliseconds for the entire flow

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the flow is active

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined flow

columns.name: maxExecutions
columns.description: Maximum number of execution history records to keep per flow

enfyra_flow_step.name: enfyra_flow_step
enfyra_flow_step.description: Defines individual steps within a flow

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: key
columns.description: Unique key within the flow used to reference this step result in the data chain

columns.name: stepOrder
columns.description: Execution order of the step within the flow

columns.name: type
columns.description: Type of operation this step performs

columns.name: config
columns.description: JSON config for the step (code, URL, table, filter, etc.)

columns.name: sourceCode
columns.description: JavaScript or TypeScript source code to execute for script and condition steps

columns.name: scriptLanguage
columns.description: Language used by sourceCode before server compilation

columns.name: compiledCode
columns.description: Server-compiled JavaScript code executed by the flow runtime

columns.name: timeout
columns.description: Maximum execution time in milliseconds for this step

columns.name: onError
columns.description: Error handling strategy: stop flow, skip step, or retry

columns.name: retryAttempts
columns.description: Number of retry attempts when onError is retry

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the step is active

columns.name: branch
columns.description: Which branch of the parent condition (true or false)

relations.description: Flow this step belongs to
Parent condition step (null = root level)

enfyra_flow_execution.name: enfyra_flow_execution
enfyra_flow_execution.description: Stores execution history and state for flow runs

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current execution status

columns.name: payload
columns.description: Input data from the trigger

columns.name: completedSteps
columns.description: Array of completed step keys for resumability

columns.name: currentStep
columns.description: Key of the currently executing step

columns.name: error
columns.description: Error details if execution failed

columns.name: startedAt
columns.description: When the execution started

columns.name: completedAt
columns.description: When the execution completed

columns.name: duration
columns.description: Execution duration in milliseconds

relations.description: Flow that was executed
User who triggered the execution (null for cron/event triggers)

enfyra_guard.name: enfyra_guard
enfyra_guard.description: Defines metadata-driven guards with nestable AND/OR logic tree for rate limiting, IP filtering, etc.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Descriptive name for the guard

columns.name: position
columns.description: Execution position: pre_auth (before JWT, only IP available) or post_auth (after JWT+Role, user available). Only meaningful for root guards

columns.name: combinator
columns.description: How children combine: and (all must pass) or or (any must pass)

columns.name: priority
columns.description: Execution order among sibling guards (lower numbers execute first)

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether the guard is active

columns.name: isGlobal
columns.description: Whether this guard applies globally to all routes. Only meaningful for root guards

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined guard

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what the guard does

relations.description: Parent guard for nested logic (null for root-level guards)
Route this guard is attached to (null when isGlobal is true). Only meaningful for root guards
HTTP methods this guard applies to. Only meaningful for root guards

enfyra_guard_rule.name: enfyra_guard_rule
enfyra_guard_rule.description: Defines individual rules/conditions within a guard (rate limit, IP whitelist/blacklist)

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key identifier

columns.name: type
columns.description: Type of rule to evaluate

columns.name: config
columns.description: Type-specific configuration (e.g. { maxRequests, perSeconds } for rate limit, { ips: [] } for IP lists)

columns.name: priority
columns.description: Evaluation order within the guard (lower numbers first)

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether this rule is active

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: Whether this is a system-defined rule

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of what this rule checks

relations.description: Guard this rule belongs to
Specific users this rule applies to (empty = all users)

enfyra_graphql.name: enfyra_graphql
enfyra_graphql.description: GraphQL configuration per table — enables/disables GraphQL API for a specific table

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key

columns.name: isEnabled
columns.description: Whether GraphQL is enabled for this table (REST-first, opt-in)

columns.name: isSystem
columns.description: System-managed flag

columns.name: description
columns.description: Human-readable description

columns.name: metadata
columns.description: Extended configuration (custom handler, timeout, etc.)

relations.description: The table this GraphQL config belongs to
